message:
fix(demo): FormValidation screen accent color and API updates

chrome.rs:
- Add FormValidation screen accent color mapping (FORMS_INPUT)

form_validation.rs:
- Fix Constraint::Percentage to use f64 (60.0, 40.0)
- Use StatefulWidget::render() for form rendering (explicit trait method)
- Use NotificationStack::new() builder for notifications rendering
- Remove redundant notification event handling (handled by stack)
- Update import for NotificationStack

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
